_protocol_note: All three agents: read AGENT_PROTOCOL.md § for your section's full rules. This file IS the shared state — claims, logs, notes, conflicts all live here.
sprint_goal: Ship crypto payments end-to-end on crypto-payments branch; resolve CI before merge to main.

commandcode_log.summary: Added CryptoPayment model with relations to Order — paymentId, payAddress, payCurrency, cryptoAmount, fiatAmount, paymentStatus, actuallyPaid, timestamps
Added NOWPAYMENTS_API_KEY, NOWPAYMENTS_IPN_SECRET, NOWPAYMENTS_API_URL env vars
NowPayments API client — getCurrencies (Redis-cached), getEstimate, createPayment, getPaymentStatus, HMAC-SHA512 IPN signature verification
Extracted shared provisioning logic — provisionInstance() handles both basic (Linode) and pro (rdp.monster) with plan lookup + markup, reusable by balance and crypto flows
Zod schemas for crypto order (plan, region, duration, tier, payCurrency) and estimate (amount, currencyFrom, currencyTo)
Refactored balance order flow to use provisionInstance(); added 4 crypto routes: GET currencies, POST estimate, POST crypto/order, GET crypto/payment/:paymentId
Added POST /webhooks/nowpayments with express.raw() body parsing, HMAC verification, IPN processing (confirmed→provision, partial, failed/expired/refunded)
Added POST /cron/expire-crypto-payments — marks orders FAILED after 1h of unpaid crypto payments
Added CryptoCurrency, CryptoEstimate, CryptoOrderResponse, CryptoPaymentStatusResponse types
Replaced crypto coming-soon badge with functional payment method selector (Balance/Crypto), currency dropdown, live estimate, crypto payment modal with address copying + status polling + retry UI
GitHub Actions scheduled workflow — pings /api/cron/expire-crypto-payments every 30min with CRON_SECRET bearer token

Rewrote rdp.monster for real reseller API — HMAC-SHA256 token auth (rotated hourly), GET /products catalog with dynamic configOptions parsing, POST /order/products/{id} with form-urlencoded body, generates own password, no-regions design with synthetic EU placeholder
Added RDP_MONSTER_EMAIL env var, changed RDP_MONSTER_API_URL default to https://manager.rdp.monster/api.php

replit_log.summary: Run prettier formatting across repo + fix CI typecheck by adding prisma generate step (commit ac81dbf, backfilled from git)
Fix CI: pin pnpm version 9 in action-setup (commit 557d201, backfilled from git)
Add CI workflow — TypeCheck, Lint, Build, Test, Secret Scan jobs (commit 4c94126, backfilled from git)
5x 'Retrigger CI checks' commits between 11:17 and 11:38 UTC (00a4838, a57054d, ed278ba, 18848ff, 659a9d9, e452c2c) — CI on crypto-payments not green yet (backfilled from git)
Add instructions for running the git-history scrub script (commit f7cc5ab, backfilled from git)
Task #9: clean git history — deliver safe, pattern-based scrub script (commit 73b71e3, backfilled from git)
New Pro provider (rdp.monster) service — getProPlans, getProRegions, createProInstance, deleteProInstance. Gracefully returns [] if RDP_MONSTER_API_KEY not set. Never exposes provider name.
Dual-provider market route — merges Basic (Linode) + Pro (rdp.monster) plans with tier tags, markup applied to both, Pro plans gracefully absent if API key not configured.
Added tier field (enum: basic|pro, default: basic) to createOrderSchema. image is now optional for Pro tier.
Orders list + single order now expose tier field extracted from metadata JSON field (defaults to basic).
Updated MarketData type with tier on plans/regions. Order type gets tier + metadata fields. Shared getDaysLeft + getRegionFlag helpers.
New persistent sidebar shell — logo, nav (Dashboard/Marketplace/Orders), active instance count badge, Clerk UserButton, mobile hamburger drawer.

Full marketplace redesign — tier tabs (All/Basic/Pro), GSAP card hover animations, sticky Order Summary panel, duration slider, region/image pickers, credentials Dialog, crypto coming-soon badge, sign-in Dialog.
Control Panel redesign — animated CountUp stat cards (Active/Total/Expiring), instance rows with tier badges + expiry countdown, empty state CTA, AppShell sidebar.
Orders redesign — search bar, filter chips (All/Active/Pending/Terminated/Failed), expandable order cards with copy-to-clipboard credentials, AlertDialog terminate confirm.
Added AnimatePresence page transitions for /market, /dashboard, /orders. Extracted AppRoutes component. Removed deprecated fallbackRedirectUrl Clerk prop.
Removed deprecated fallbackRedirectUrl prop from ClerkProvider (TypeScript error fix).
Full SEO/meta overhaul: lang=en, og:* tags fixed, og:image, canonical URL, Twitter card, JSON-LD Organization, sitemap link
New sitemap.xml with all public routes
New admin Dev tab — agent activity feed + architecture map iframes
Added GET /admin/agent-context endpoint

claude_log.summary: Protocol-hygiene pass: dropped 6 protocol-restatement notes (live in AGENT_PROTOCOL.md), set sprint_goal, added CI struggle note, added log-hygiene note flagging legacy batched timestamps, backfilled replit_log with 6 entries from git (real commit timestamps)

notes: Three-agent setup — CommandCode (backend/heavy-lifting), Replit (frontend/UI), Claude (specialist/overflow). Protocol details live in AGENT_PROTOCOL.md, not here.
Cyberise is an RDP marketplace — users buy RDP/VPS servers provisioned on Linode (Basic) or rdp.monster (Pro)
Tier system: Basic = Linode-backed, Pro = rdp.monster-backed. NEVER show provider names to buyers.
Frontend: Vite + React (artifacts/cyberise/), API: Express 5 (artifacts/api-server/)
Auth is handled by Clerk — middleware validates JWT tokens
Database is PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM (lib/db/) — schema at lib/db/prisma/schema.prisma. Commands: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run db:push | migrate | generate
Rate limiting uses Upstash Redis — three presets: market(30/min), order(5/min), strict(10/min)
RDP passwords are AES-encrypted at rest via CryptoJS
Order.metadata Json field stores { tier, proInstanceId } — no DB migration needed for tier
AppShell wraps Market, Dashboard, Orders pages individually — landing page is untouched
RDP_MONSTER_API_KEY env var: when not set, Pro plans gracefully return [] (Pro tab shows coming-soon placeholder)
GSAP installed in @workspace/cyberise — used for plan card hover transforms in Market.tsx
Don't touch lib/db/prisma/schema.prisma without coordinating between agents
Deployment target is Vercel — Vite builds frontend, esbuild bundles API
GITHUB: Push to origin is blocked by secret scanning — old commits contain real Stripe key + Vercel PAT in .replit. User must click GitHub unblock URLs OR rewrite history. Both keys must be rotated.
CLERK: Production keys only work on cyberise.org domain — login errors in Replit dev sandbox are EXPECTED, not a bug
CLERK: fallbackRedirectUrl is NOT a valid prop — use signInFallbackRedirectUrl/signUpFallbackRedirectUrl

CRYPTO: NowPayments.io integrated — /api/market/crypto/order creates PENDING order + crypto payment, IPN at /api/webhooks/nowpayments provisions on 'confirmed' status, cron at /api/cron/expire-crypto-payments expires unpaid orders after 1h, partial payments shown in UI with top-up prompt
CRYPTO: Env vars needed — NOWPAYMENTS_API_KEY, NOWPAYMENTS_IPN_SECRET (both required), NOWPAYMENTS_API_URL (defaults to https://api.nowpayments.io)
CRYPTO: Prisma migration 'add_crypto_payments' must be applied before crypto features work

RDP_MONSTER: Real reseller API — requires both RDP_MONSTER_API_KEY and RDP_MONSTER_EMAIL. Auth is HMAC-SHA256. Plans come from /products (ProxmoxVPS), ordering via POST /order/products/{id}. No deletion endpoint — services must be cancelled in dashboard.

CI: crypto-payments branch had 5x 'Retrigger CI checks' commits between 2026-05-21 11:17 and 11:38 UTC. Root cause not yet diagnosed — investigate before next feature work. CI workflow lives at .github/workflows/ci.yml.

LOG HYGIENE: commandcode_log entries dated 2026-05-20T00:00:00Z and earlier replit_log entries dated T00:00:00Z / T13:12:00Z are batched end-of-session timestamps, not per-edit. Going forward all agents MUST use real HH:MM:SS UTC timestamps. Enforced by scripts/src/check-agent-context.ts (run via `pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run check:agent-context`).
